things.name: Machu Picchu
things.description: The Inca citadel in the clouds — 1-hour flight to Cusco then bus and train to the most iconic ruin on Earth

things.name: Huaca Pucllana Ruins
things.description: Adobe pyramid rising from the middle of Miraflores — active archaeological site with nightly dinner service beside it

things.name: Miraflores Clifftop Walk
things.description: Stroll the El Malecón clifftop promenade above the Pacific — paragliders launch here at sunset

things.name: Central Restaurant
things.description: World's #1 restaurant (2023) — Virgilio Martínez's tasting menu explores every ecosystem of Peru by altitude

things.name: Larco Museum
things.description: Outstanding pre-Columbian collection in a colonial mansion — the famous erotic pottery gallery included

things.name: Barranco Bohemian District
things.description: Lima's most charming neighbourhood — Bridge of Sighs, seafront cliffs, craft bars and the best ceviche

things.name: Ceviche Food Tour
things.description: Peru invented ceviche — the National Ceviche Day (June 28) sees free helpings across the city

things.name: Lima Historic Centre
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Spanish colonial downtown — Plaza Mayor, catacombs of San Francisco and the Palace of Justice

things.name: Paragliding over Miraflores
things.description: Tandem paragliding from the cliffs of Miraflores — fly over the Pacific with the city skyline behind you

things.name: Pachacamac Sanctuary Day Trip
things.description: 40-km drive to a vast pre-Inca oracle temple complex overlooking the Pacific — 5 separate pyramids
